title: selaginella monodii
intro: Selaginella monodii, also known as the "spike moss," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella monodii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
